briefing: Neutral day with NASDAQ -0.6% and S&P 500 -0.2% — not the risk-on environment needed to deploy the remaining $677 into new positions. The top candidates (DOCN, VERA, NVDA) all show clean 4-signal setups and remain on watch, but strategy memory is clear: hold through neutral days and wait for a genuine risk-on signal like NASDAQ +2% before adding. Existing positions are intact; stop-losses and profit targets will manage them automatically.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A consolidation day is when markets move sideways or drift slightly lower after a strong rally — prices 'consolidate' recent gains before the next move. It is not a warning sign; it is healthy. The risk for traders is overreacting by selling winners or chasing new positions into weakening momentum. The correct response is patience: let existing positions breathe and wait for the next directional signal.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 整理日是指市場在一段強勁上漲後橫盤震盪或小幅回落的交易日——股價在「整固」近期漲幅，等待下一波方向性突破。整理日本身並非警告訊號，反而是健康的市場行為。交易者常犯的錯誤是在此時過度反應，急於停利出場或追入動能減弱的新部位。正確做法是保持耐心：讓現有持倉自然運作，等待下一個明確的方向性信號。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted lower on Monday as investors took a cautious stance heading into the second half of earnings season, with the NASDAQ slipping 0.6% as high-growth tech names faced mild selling pressure after a strong multi-week rally. The S&P 500 held up better, off only 0.2%, suggesting defensive rotation rather than outright risk-off sentiment. No major macro catalysts drove the move — it was largely a consolidation session after recent gains.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一小幅回落，投資者在財報季下半場開始前保持觀望態度。那斯達克指數下跌0.6%，高增長科技股在近期大幅上漲後承壓整理。標普500指數跌幅較溫和，僅下跌0.2%，顯示市場以防禦性輪動為主，而非全面避險。整體而言，今日走勢屬於技術性整理，缺乏重大宏觀催化劑。
